name: TODO: House modes — setter at sunset

44444444-4444-4444-8444-444444444444.value: MODE SETTER. One per mode-entry condition (time, presence, button). Reads current mode and only overrides modes lower in priority (here: don't override 'away' with 'evening'). Mode REACTORS (separate flows) trigger on variable_text_changed and fan out — dim lights, arm Heimdall, set thermostat profile, etc. Don't put mode logic into every behavioural flow.
